Bash(curl -s "https://results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/chartwiseresult-S22.htm" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find all table rows with party data rows = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for row in rows[:30]: cells = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', row, re.DOTALL\) if cells: clean = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', c\).strip\(\) for c in cells] if any\(clean\): print\('|'.join\(clean[:6]\)\) " | head -30)

Bash(curl -s "https://results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/chartwiseresult-S22.htm" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
print\('SIZE:', len\(html\)\)
# Find script tags with JSON data
scripts = re.findall\(r'<script[^>]*>\(.*?\)</script>', html, re.DOTALL\)
for i, s in enumerate\(scripts\):
    if 'party' in s.lower\(\) or 'tvk' in s.lower\(\) or 'dmk' in s.lower\(\):
        print\(f'SCRIPT {i}:', s[:500]\)
        break
" | head -40)

Bash(curl -s "https://results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/ConstituencywiseS2212.htm" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find all table rows rows = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for row in rows[:25]: cells = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', row, re.DOTALL\) if cells: clean = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', c\).strip\(\) for c in cells] if any\(c for c in clean if c\): print\('|'.join\(clean[:8]\)\) " | head -25)

Bash(curl -s "https://results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/ConstituencywiseS2212.htm" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read\(\)
# Find constituency name in heading
h = re.findall\(r'<h[123][^>]*>\(.*?\)</h[123]>', html, re.DOTALL\)
for x in h[:5]:
    print\('H:', re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', x\).strip\(\)\)
# Find caption
caps = re.findall\(r'<caption[^>]*>\(.*?\)</caption>', html, re.DOTALL\)
for x in caps[:3]:
    print\('CAP:', re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', x\).strip\(\)\)
# Find title
title = re.findall\(r'<title>\(.*?\)</title>', html\)
for x in title:
    print\('TITLE:', x.strip\(\)\)
# Status line
if 'Status Known' in html:
    idx = html.index\('Status Known'\)
    print\('STATUS:', html[idx:idx+100]\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://results.eci.gov.in/ResultAcGenMay2026/statewiseS221.htm" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c " import sys, re html = sys.stdin.read\(\) rows = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) for row in rows[:5]: # Extract direct tds \(not nested\) # First get all cells cells = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', row, re.DOTALL\) if cells and len\(cells\) >= 3: # Get text content \(strip tags\) clean = [re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', c\).strip\(\)[:40] for c in cells] if clean[0]: print\('ROW:', ' | '.join\(clean[:9]\)\) " | head -15)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/summary 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Last updated:', d.get\('lastUpdated'\)\)
print\('Status:', d.get\('statusLine'\)\)
print\('Parties:'\)
for p in d.get\('parties', []\)[:8]:
    print\(f\\"  {p['party']:8s} total={p['total']:3d} won={p['won']:3d} leading={p['leading']:3d} {p['fullName'][:35]}\\"\)
")

    print\(f\\"  AC{c['id']:3d} {c['name'][:20]:20s} {c['leadingParty']:8s} {c['leadingCandidate'][:20]:20s} margin={c['margin']}\\"\)
print\('Last 3:'\)
for c in d[-3:]:
    print\(f\\"  AC{c['id']:3d} {c['name'][:20]:20s} {c['leadingParty']:8s} {c['leadingCandidate'][:20]:20s} margin={c['margin']}\\"\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/constituencies 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
keywords = ['kolathur', 'chepauk', 'thiruvallikeni', 'edappadi', 'coimbatore south', 'tiruvottiyur', 'sattur', 'virudhunagar', 'perambur', 'trichy', 'thiruchirapalli east', 'karaikudi', 'aravakurichi', 'harbour']
for c in d:
    name = c['name'].lower\(\)
    for kw in keywords:
        if kw in name:
            print\(f\\"AC{c['id']:3d} | {c['name']:30s} | {c['leadingParty']:8s} | {c['leadingCandidate']:25s} | margin={c['margin']:6d}\\"\)
            break
" | sort -t'|' -k1)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/constituencies 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Search for interesting results/names
stars = ['panneerselvam', 'thirumavalavan', 'anbumani', 'premallatha', 'vijayakant', 'tasmac', 'sekar', 'durai']
for c in d:
    lc = c['leadingCandidate'].lower\(\)
    tc = c['trailingCandidate'].lower\(\)
    for s in stars:
        if s in lc or s in tc:
            print\(f\\"AC{c['id']:3d} | {c['name']:30s} | Lead: {c['leadingParty']:6s} {c['leadingCandidate']:20s} | Trail: {c['trailingParty']:6s} {c['trailingCandidate']:20s} | margin={c['margin']}\\"\)
            break
")

import sys, re
d = sys.stdin.read\(\)
m = re.search\(r'Currently Leading', d\)
tvk = re.search\(r'TVK.*?107|107.*?TVK', d\)
print\('Currently Leading section:', 'YES' if m else 'NO'\)
print\('TVK 107 visible:', 'YES' if tvk else 'NO'\)
# Count party cards
cards = re.findall\(r'\\"party\\":\\"\(\\w+\)\\"', d\)
print\('Parties in data:', list\(dict.fromkeys\(cards\)\)[:8]\)
")
